title: The Legacy Alignment Activation
subtitle: A five-part ritual for anchoring your generational wealth vision in grounded trust
excerpt: The Week 11 ritual from a 12-week money programme. The five steps move from preparing the body and imagination, through a release and an allow, to integrating the shift with breath and a grounding anchor. The aim is to make the generational wealth vision feel settled and certain rather than aspirational.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 11 ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: The Week 11 ritual from a 12-week money programme. Week 11 theme: create generational wealth vision. The five steps move through prepare, release, allow, integrate, and anchor. The aim is to make the vision of building lasting abundance feel settled and real rather than aspirational.
New to rituals as a practice? Read

Sit quietly. Imagine your family tree in front of you: roots stretching down, branches expanding upward. Each branch or leaf is a future generation. You don't need to name anyone. Just let the image settle.
I am ready to release all fear, doubt, and limitation around my ability to build and sustain generational wealth. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to embrace and allow my full ability to build and sustain generational wealth, for myself and for every generation that follows. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take a slow, full breath in and all the way out. Let any remaining tension release with it. Picture a steady energy moving down through your ancestry and forward through your descendants: stabilising, nourishing, expanding through the whole line.
Write the following sentence in your own handwriting. Feel it as you write. Say it out loud once.
I am grateful that I am building a legacy of abundance, safety, and freedom for generations to come.
Adapted from the Week 11 ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
